Driver Pay Rates
F1  Pay Structure
Active
Race completed50 R$
Race win bonus+50 R$
Podium bonus+20 R$
Fastest lap bonus+10 R$
Pole position bonus+10 R$
WDC bonus1,000 R$
WCC bonus (split 2)1,000 R$
2nd in standings (season)+250 R$
WCC bonus split equally between both main drivers
F2  Pay Structure
Active
Race completed25 R$
Race win bonus+25 R$
Podium bonus+15 R$
Fastest lap bonus+5 R$
Pole position bonus+5 R$
WDC bonus500 R$
WCC bonus (split 2)500 R$
2nd in standings (season)+100 R$
WCC bonus split equally between both main drivers
F3  Pay Structure
No Driver Pay F3 is a development series. Drivers are not compensated financially but gain experience and may be promoted to paid series.
F4  Pay Structure
No Driver Pay F4 is the entry-level series. Drivers are not compensated financially but gain experience and may be promoted to paid series.
